response.justification: Bogdan has a strong background in software engineering with deep expertise in performance optimization, system architecture, and hardware-software co-design, demonstrated through roles involving low-latency systems, embedded development, and AI-agent infrastructure. However, his experience lacks direct focus on AI accelerators, SoC/IP modeling, or deep-learning workload optimization, which are core to this role. His education and professional background also do not align closely with the required hardware-centric qualifications.
strengths: Extensive experience in performance-critical systems (low-latency apps, real-time metadata handling, robotic arms with DLang/Java)
Strong foundation in system architecture, hardware-software co-design, and optimization (Dlang, C++, embedded systems)
Proven ability to work across full stack, including backend services and developer tooling (Node.js, TypeScript, AWS CDK, MCP)
concerns: No documented experience with SoC/IP modeling or AI accelerator hardware optimization
Lacks direct experience with deep-learning workload analysis or GPU architecture
Education (BSc in CS + Fine Arts) does not meet the required PhD/Master's/bachelor's in a relevant engineering field for the principal-level role
